nasb.text: Ashdod, its towns and its villages; Gaza, its towns and its villages; as far as the brook of Egypt and the Great Sea, even its coastline.

esv.text: Ashdod, its towns and its villages; Gaza, its towns and its villages; to the Brook of Egypt, and the Great Sea with its coastline.

cnv.text: 亞實突和屬於亞實突的市鎮村莊；迦薩和屬於迦薩的市鎮村莊；直到埃及小河和大海沿岸的地方。

ccb.text: 亚实突及其附近的城邑和乡村，迦萨及其附近的城邑和乡村，直到埃及小河和地中海沿岸。
